limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 (named programs, no quantified scale).

AI narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases (generative AI chatbots, data science platform integration) with operational detail, but no quantified business results (e.g., % improvement, cost savings) were disclosed.

Risk disclosure is detailed and company-specific with named mechanisms (cybersecurity vulnerabilities, regulatory compliance costs, reputational harm, profit margin impact), but no formal quantification or named governance body was cited, limiting score to 4.
